meaning: adj.充满潮湿的,湿润的,多湿气的
examples: It's hot out – very hot, very humid.
The island is hot and humid in the summer.
These plants love warm, humid atmospheres.
The humid conditions that spread rust most readily have recently been lacking in most places.
It was February and Townsville, in the north of Queensland, was stifling, unbearably humid.
